title: GTM, Strategy & Delivery
must_haves: 2+ years in a high-ownership environment (startups, consulting, banking)
Builder's mindset; thrive in ambiguity; extreme ownership
Lead end-to-end delivery of customer POCs and new product rollouts (bridge product/eng/GTM)
Bonus: designed/delivered POCs and new products to ENTERPRISE customers
hard_blockers: Enterprise delivery role: embed with customers to design/prototype/deploy POCs — Ryan has community-led GTM, not enterprise POC/solutions delivery
Domain = patent/IP / R&D AI for Fortune 500 + global law firms (L'Oreal, Vorys/Fenwick); Ryan's domain is crypto/Web3, not IP/legal
Office-first London; team skews Palantir/Amazon/BCG pedigree
met_strengths: Easily clears 2+ yrs high-ownership startup bar (~6.4 yrs)
Builder mindset + agentic-AI building (Claude Code) fits prototype/deploy framing
one_line_verdict: Clears the experience floor and has builder/agentic signal, but it's a customer-facing enterprise-POC delivery role in IP/legal-tech — outside Ryan's community-GTM, crypto-domain profile.
fetch_note: Confirmed open via Ashby API. Ankar: AI R&D/IP platform, >$24M raised (Atomico, Index, Norrsken). Hoxton Sq London office-first, £49-66k + EMI equity, visa sponsorship available. Note: Ankar also has a separate 'Founder's Associate' (growth/marketing/hiring) role that would fit Ryan markedly better than this delivery role.
